Title: Successful User Registration with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User is on the registration page of the app.
Test Data: Valid email (e.g., testuser@example.com), valid password (e.g., Password123!), valid name (e.g., John Doe), valid date of birth (e.g., 01/01/2000)
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email address in the email field.
2. Enter valid password in the password field.
3. Re-enter the same password in the confirm password field.
4. Enter valid first name and last name.
5. Enter valid date of birth.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User account is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the login page with a confirmation message.

5. Enter valid date of birth.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: Error message appears stating "Invalid email format. Please enter a valid email address."
